title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
author: openai-blog
raw_description: More intelligence from every token, stronger performance per dollar, and more capability on demand for your hardest work.
summary: OpenAI发布GPT-5.6，提供更强的每token智能、每美元性能，以及按需扩展的能力，旨在支持最复杂的工作负载。
analysis_note: 顶级模型发布，性能与成本优化显著，但缺乏技术细节，评分略降。
